fault_hypothesis: On line 67, when new_value exceeds the ceiling, it is clamped to `effective_ceiling - 1` instead of `effective_ceiling`, causing the counter to be set one below the ceiling rather than at the ceiling.

constraints.intent: After clamping, new_value should equal effective_ceiling, not effective_ceiling - 1.
The clamped value must equal the ceiling, not be one less than it.
At the end of the clamping branch, new_value should equal effective_ceiling.

spec.expr: effective_ceiling__1 is None or new_value__3 <= effective_ceiling__1

constraints.intent: Before storing, new_value must not exceed the effective ceiling.
